column1: Hey Morgan, thanks for your interest in traveling with SpringBreak U by Go Blue Tours. Your personal trip rep, Spiffy, will text shortly with info and details
What's good! It's Spiffy from SpringBreak U here
Which week is your spring break? I'll send over the options and deets
Cool I got you. which destination were you lookin to book
Right now it's 3 people but depending on the price it could be around 10
Word yea thats solid. which school you all from?
Oh fire yea we have a few bama groups rollin with us this year
Y'all always have good energy lol
gonna put this info together for you rn, how soon were you lookin to get things booked?
lol yeah, my friends are one of them
Preferably sooner than later, as soon as we get the numbers back and how often we have to pay i'll have a number for you
Oh bet! Yea happy to help y'all out
Gonna send the info through email is that cool? It's a little long for text
Dope what's the best email to send to?
Could you resend it in a text? My email isn't working for some reason sorry.
hey all good yea let me try resending it maybe
hey checkin in, we narrow down on which option we wanna roll with?
sup! we still looking to get situated for spring break?
whats up Morgan did y'all still need help with spring break or you all set?
yoo Morgan did y'all get to book anything for spring break yet
yo Morgan wanted to make sure I didnt miss you! is spring break still a thing for y'all or not anymore
Hi! sorry for the late response, we didn't think we were gonna end up going but now we are! There's going to be three maybe five of us and we want to know the cheapest option
Okay dope. The cheapest option for you rn is looking like Punta Cana
Would you be interested in that
From mar 16-20 is our dates. we were hoping to go to Mexico, but if Dominican Republic is much cheaper than that would also work.
what is the price look like?
We could do Cancun but it would have to be like the 18th to 22nd
If you cool with that I'll send that over too
hey would you wanna do those dates?
Is there anything that's earlier in the week?
yea we can do anything besides the 13-17 for cancun, what dates were you thinking?
also we could do any dates for Punta cana, that where I go every year its lit for spring break
yea we can do Cabo, def pricier but we have some space
yea we got punta too, thats the best option imo
i can send you both over to check out
is moshea1012@icloud.com still good for you?
just sent lmk if you got it!
got it! give me a second to read through it
How much does the price change if there's 5-6 of us rather than 3
it stays about the same, for 6 we'd just do 2 rooms of 3 and 5 we could do a room of 3 and room of 2
2 per room is a lil more expensive, but I could even it out so that everyone is paying the same if you'd like
We're going to try to get everything finalized today/wednesday
Bet. we thinkin Punta Cana still?
Looking right now to see which one has cheaper flight flights and then we'll decide!
Grand Oasis Cancun From 17-21 please! for 3 of us!
okay cool yea lets do it
let me confirm availability for a 17th check in and get back to you in a few!
The hotel is all inclusive correct?
Hi! do you have the availability yet?
will text you as soon as I have the green light
sounds good! we just found flights for super cheap like 300 bucks so we're trying to get them booked soon but there's only a few seats left
yea for sure thats a steal! and thats the 17-21?
we only need one room, the three of us can share a king if possible
I just got word that the only start date we can do tht week is the 18th
let me see if those flights work
Bet, I'll send over the reservation in 10
We were ready to finalize tonight right
Lilly and I are both ready to pay tonight. Liza's dad is paying and he's asleep on a different time zone so she can't pay tonight. But we are ready to finalize the reservations
morning! dope, lmk if you need anything. whenever you get your flights, mind adding that info into your flights tab on your account
hey is Liza still hopping in on the trip
yes, is there any way we can move the dates to the 14th or around there, flights are going way expensive
yea let me put that request in now
She's talking to her dad right now!
oh actually the 18th is all we can do for start date. things are all sold out for anything before that
crap so there's no chance at all? even if we're all in one room
alright no worries, we'll keep the 18th
okay, let me know about Liza soon as possible. her spot got removed due to inactivity

Okay we have 2 more people wanting to come as well. We're thinking about going on monday or tuesday. for 5 of us. His agent with spring break U said there wa some type of availability for the 5 night monday through saturday or tuesday through sunday
Gotcha, what's the name of your friend? The availability he saw may have been from a sample quote. The only available dates that week are the dates you have
We can add them two to your reservation, just let me know when they're ready
Okay cool. Yea for Grand Oasis we'll have to stick to what you have. If you want to switch the Krystal, we can do the 15th to 20th
is Liza not rolling with the squad anymore
she is! Can you reemail it to her
Here is connor's email as well
Wait so Connor and Reese want a room, and then Liz in yours?
Okay, I just gotta make sure I can do it
Are they all ready to pay right now?
liza said she doesn't see anything in her email
Yea I gotta get this all approved and opened first since inventory is low
Also, all she needs is the link you have
Slots will be open in a few
Reese and Connor's room is avail now
Sounds good we're all at work give me two seconds to go find him
liza is filling it out now
Liza's spot isn't there yet tho
her room is with us right
that's liza's number can you text her when the rooms open
Okay dope! Apologies was waiting on our ops team to adjust that room
We need them to make their payment tho to lock it in. Soon as possible this am
Sounds good! No worries, they'll do it as soon as they wake up. They just say couldn't do it while we were at work because we didn't have our card numbers
Hi! Did you email the link to connor and reese, they can't find it
Hey morning. It'll be so much easier to just text it to them
sounds good, i'll send it to them now. We just got off of work so give them just a sec
Connor is filling it out now. Reese isn't awake yet

konnor paid half, his bank won't let him pay the full without it showing up at fraud. He's calling them monday morning as soon as they open to tell them it's okay because they're closed on sunday's but he paid half
did he try doing two separate transactions
yes, it declined the second one as fraud
he just has to call his bank on monday first thing in the AM and tell them it's him and not fraud
Can we switch to dominican republic? None of our parents will let us go to mexico after what just happened
yea we can, will put the note to the ops team first thing in the am. did you want to keep the same dates
I'll be in Punta too actually
sounds great thank you. Can we actually switch to the 16/17-20/21 now?
yea we can look into the 16-20 for sure
just put the inquiry in to ask
yo so its possible! did you want to officially switch?
did you get to look at flights?
woudl recommend trying a few different date arrangements
okay dope. wanna lock it in?
got you, any word on conner and Reese? we arent able to switch them over until theyre all paid up
what's the name of the resort we're staying at in Punta Cana
Is there any selection on rooms at all?
all rooms are double bed rooms, 2 futons, and a balcony
heads up tho we need connor and reese to pay by tonight to keep their spots
I looked online. How much more would it be for us to get the room with the hot tub on the balcony
Tbh its gonna be best to just upgrade to that during check in
Hey hey any word on Reese and Connor?
Hi! I just wanted to double check on liza, she just saw her email and it says that she's not checked in with us
it said she was like $40 short on her payment
she can pay that right now as long as she's still in the room with us!
hi! just following up on the liza thing and also reese is ready to pay tonight if you can add him back to Connor's room
I'll put in the request for Reese and see. there may be a small increase in rates since the group last joined

Hey morning. that spot is open now for Reese. we need him to hop in and make is payment by noon today if possible. theres also a $40 balance for you Lilly in Liza to complete the 3-person room rate of $670
sounds good! having reese pay now
can you send me the link for reese
its all the same link you have
Liked “its all the same link you have”
everyones reservation is on the same link
wait i lied evan paid not reese but we know him too😭
word need reese to pay asap
hey hey, finalizing your accounts, did y'all plan on adding any party pass tickets or the booze cruise event to your trip?
Ill send you an email with the breakdown. party pass is dope comes with express entry, cover charge, and open bar at our off resort hosted nightclub events
Coco Bongo: $79 per person Imagine: $89 per person Maroca: $69 per person Booze Cruise: $79 per person
hey, still need Lilly and Aliza to finish paying so we can finalize their accounts if you could reach out to them
lilly is paid, liza i have no idea what her dad is doing tbh
for the coco bongo and or the other ones, are those on resort or off resort?
hey hey, those events are off resort. comes with round trip coach bus transportation
hey is Evan on the same flight as anyone else in the group?
